title: Minimum Absolute Difference Queries
titleCn: 查询差绝对值的最小值

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,4,8], queries = [[0,1],[1,2],[2,3],[0,3]] Output: [2,1,4,1] Explanation: The queries are processed as follows: - queries[0] = [0,1]: The subarray is [1,3] and the minimum absolute difference is |1-3| = 2. - queries[1] = [1,2]: The subarray is [3,4] and the minimum absolute difference is |3-4| = 1. - queries[2] = [2,3]: The subarray is [4,8] and the minimum absolute difference is |4-8| = 4. - queries[3] = [0,3]: The subarray is [1,3,4,8] and the minimum absolute difference is |3-4| = 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: [2,1,4,1] Explanation: The queries are processed as follows: - queries[0] = [0,1]: The subarray is [1,3] and the minimum absolute difference is |1-3| = 2. - queries[1] = [1,2]: The subarray is [3,4] and the minimum absolute difference is |3-4| = 1. - queries[2] = [2,3]: The subarray is [4,8] and the minimum absolute difference is |4-8| = 4. - queries[3] = [0,3]: The subarray is [1,3,4,8] and the minimum absolute difference is |3-4| = 1.

testcases.input: nums = [4,5,2,2,7,10], queries = [[2,3],[0,2],[0,5],[3,5]] Output: [-1,1,1,3] Explanation: The queries are processed as follows: - queries[0] = [2,3]: The subarray is [2,2] and the minimum absolute difference is -1 because all the elements are the same. - queries[1] = [0,2]: The subarray is [4,5,2] and the minimum absolute difference is |4-5| = 1. - queries[2] = [0,5]: The subarray is [4,5,2,2,7,10] and the minimum absolute difference is |4-5| = 1. - queries[3] = [3,5]: The subarray is [2,7,10] and the minimum absolute difference is |7-10| = 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: [-1,1,1,3] Explanation: The queries are processed as follows: - queries[0] = [2,3]: The subarray is [2,2] and the minimum absolute difference is -1 because all the elements are the same. - queries[1] = [0,2]: The subarray is [4,5,2] and the minimum absolute difference is |4-5| = 1. - queries[2] = [0,5]: The subarray is [4,5,2,2,7,10] and the minimum absolute difference is |4-5| = 1. - queries[3] = [3,5]: The subarray is [2,7,10] and the minimum absolute difference is |7-10| = 3.
